title: Cute Mob Models: Immersive Engineer Patch
description: Adds textures for the Immersive Engineer villagers to Cute Mob Models Resource Pack
body:
A small resource pack that correctly textures the villagers added by Immersive Engineer when using the Cute Mob Models resource pack

Credit to the creators of the original mod and resource pack emmie_4, yarrmateys, and LugiaGamerYT for original models and textures

Works for 1.12 , 1.14, 1.15 and 1.16.

Only dependencies are Optifine and Cute Mob Models resource Pack. Also immersive engineering, without IE this pack doesn't do anything.

Note: Optifine 1.14 U5 doesn't work on the newest forge versions for 1.14 This is not the resource pack's fault

Made as part of Immersive Waifus modpack for 1.12.2. [Click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/immersive-waifus)
